addons.name: AniList
addons.description: AniList metadata provider - provides manga metadata, tracking, and ID resolution. Supports reading list sync with OAuth2.

addons.name: Asura Scans
addons.description: Asura Scans - Popular scanlation group for manhwa and manga
addons.author: Tsubaki Team

2.0.0.changelog: Full rewrite as a JSON API client. Asura migrated to an Astro SPA backed by api.asurascans.com (the old HTML scraper got an empty client-rendered grid). Browse/search/detail/chapters/pages all via the public API — no browser/FlareSolverr needed. Restores a previously-dead major source.

1.9.7.changelog: get_series description now from og:description (was a ~10-char meta fragment); status via .capitalize span; author/artist via browse?author=/artist= links; release year from .imptdt.

1.9.5.changelog: Fix browse/search listing the rating number instead of the series title

addons.author: Tsubaki Community

1.2.3.changelog: Index reconciled: latest_version pointed at a non-existent 1.2.4 zip while download_url served 1.2.2 — upgrades never converged. Now matches the real 1.2.3 build (canonical id migrates the mangatown-rhai dir via previous_ids).

2.0.0.changelog: FlareSolverr-based fetch + requires_proxy (routes via configured proxy)

2.0.1.changelog: FlareSolverr-based fetch + requires_proxy:true so nhentai egresses through the configured residential proxy (fixes 0-results from datacenter IP ban)

addons.name: nhentai (Scraper)
addons.description: nhentai doujinshi/manga source — HTML-scraping variant via FlareSolverr. Use this when the JSON API (nhentai.net/api) is Cloudflare/IP-blocked; it parses the rendered web pages instead. Contains EXPLICIT adult content - 18+ only.
addons.author: Tsubaki Community

1.0.0.changelog: Initial release — HTML-scraping nhentai connector via FlareSolverr (sidesteps the IP-blocked JSON API)

1.1.6.changelog: Fixed search: the old /filter?keyword= endpoint never filtered. Search now uses the site's /search?keyword= form target rendered via FlareSolverr (results are injected client-side by Ajax Search Pro).

1.4.8.changelog: Fixed connector hard-down with 'Stack overflow' on browse/search: very large result arrays (Webtoon's broad title-anchor selector matches hundreds of series) overflow the Rhai->Rust conversion. Cap each page's results at 100 (browse + search both paginate).

1.0.5.changelog: API fully token-gated now; rewrite to FlareSolverr-render the SPA DOM for browse/search/detail/chapters (.lrow cards, /browse?keyword); adds genres/authors/status/year/description metadata

addons.description: Scraper for MangaFire (mangafire.to), a popular manga aggregator with multi-language support and a large catalog.

addons.name: Kagane

1.12.0.changelog: Improved error handling, timeout/retry fixes, FlareSolverr fallback for Cloudflare

1.12.1.changelog: Better error messages for invalid chapter IDs, throw instead of silently returning empty

1.12.2.changelog: Fix chapter download 500 error â€” use pipe separator instead of slash in compound chapter IDs

1.12.3.changelog: Handle legacy / separator in chapter IDs for backwards compatibility with existing DB entries

1.12.8.changelog: Migrate to kagane.to (kagane.org API now IP-blocks datacenter IPs)

addons.name: MangaNato (Unified)
addons.description: Unified scraper for MangaNato sites including manganato.gg, mangakakalot.gg, nelomanga.net, natomanga.com, and manganato.com. Distributes requests across all mirrors for maximum reliability.
addons.author: Tsubaki Community

1.2.5.changelog: Fixed search: the /search/ path is Cloudflare-gated, so the browser/HTTP mirror-cycling returned empty after ~30s. Search now goes through FlareSolverr first (solves CF, returns div.story_item results).

1.0.0.changelog: Initial release - API-based scraper with massive multi-language catalog
